projectDescription: An open-source overclocking tool for Nintendo Switch consoles running Atmosphere custom firmware, enabling advanced CPU, GPU, and RAM tuning via a KIP module, sysmodule daemon, and Ultrahand overlay.
keyFeatures: CPU overclocking up to 2703 MHz (Mariko) and 1785 MHz (Erista)
GPU overclocking up to 1536 MHz (Mariko) and 1075 MHz (Erista)
RAM overclocking up to 3200 MHz (Mariko) and 2400 MHz (Erista)
Per-game application clock profiles via Ultrahand overlay
Global and temporary real-time clock override
Over/undervolting with per-frequency voltage tables for CPU, GPU, and SOC
Custom LPDDR4X memory timing configuration (tRCD, tRP, tRAS, tRFC, etc.)
Thermal throttle guard with configurable temperature threshold
DVFS mode (PCV hijack) for fine-grained voltage-frequency scaling
hoc-clk sysmodule with IPC API for real-time clock/sensor monitoring
Horizon OC Monitor overlay: Full, Mini, Micro, FPS Counter, FPS Graph modes
Benchmark Toolbox with FurMark stress test
Supports Erista (T210), Mariko (T214/T210B01), and all Switch form factors (V1, V2, Lite, OLED)
publicApiSurface: HocClkConfigValue enum (poll_interval_ms, cpu_max_m, cpu_max_e, thermal_throttle, dvfs_mode, gpu_scheduling, …)
KipConfigValue enum (mariko_emc_max_clock, mariko_cpu_uv_low, g_volt_*, g_soc_volt_*, t1_trcd … t8_trefi, …)
CustomizeTable struct (KIP binary patch data: CUST rev 4, KIP version 241)
HocClkModule enum (CPU, GPU, MEM, Governor, Display)
